ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the test configuration */,
  "launch_config" TEXT /* Launch configuration parameters (e.g., [3000, 128]) */,
  "gpu_model" INTEGER /* ID of the GPU model used for the test */,
  "test_environment" INTEGER /* ID of the test environment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "test_purpose" TEXT /* Brief description of the purpose of the test configuration */,
  "expected_results" TEXT /* Expected performance metrics or outcomes */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize test configurations */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the configuration is active */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_environment FOREIGN KEY ("test_environment") REFERENCES test_environments ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_gpu_model FOREIGN KEY ("gpu_model") REFERENCES gpu_models ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration used for the run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., success, failed, in progress) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test run ended */,
  "run_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who ran the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the test run */,
  "test_purpose" TEXT /* Brief description of the purpose of the test run */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments specific to the test run */,
  "test_environment_version" TEXT /* Version of the test environment used */,
  "test_duration_ms" TEXT /* Total duration of the test run in milliseconds */,
  "test_result_file" TEXT /* Path to the result file or log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_run_by FOREIGN KEY ("run_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run the metrics belong to */,
  "row_per_tb" INTEGER /* Number of rows processed per terabyte */,
  "elapsed_time_ms" TEXT /* Elapsed time in milliseconds */,
  "bandwidth_utilization" TEXT /* Bandwidth utilization percentage */,
  "sm_throughput" TEXT /* SM throughput percentage */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., throughput, latency) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gpu_models" (
  "gpu_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GPU model */,
  "gpu_name" TEXT /* Name of the GPU model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the GPU */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Technical specifications of the GPU */,
  "gpu_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the GPU */,
  "gpu_memory_type" TEXT /* Type of memory */,
  "gpu_clock_speed" INTEGER /* Clock speed of the GPU in MHz */,
  "gpu_power_consumption" INTEGER /* Power consumption in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpu_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test environment */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the test environment */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used in the environment */,
  "hardware" TEXT /* Hardware configuration of the environment */,
  "software" TEXT /* Software configuration of the environment */,
  "env_architecture" TEXT /* Architecture of the test environment */,
  "env_network" TEXT /* Network configuration */,
  "env_storage" TEXT /* Storage configuration */,
  "env_version" TEXT /* Version of the environment setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data scientist, engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical change */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test configuration that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "change_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the change on the test configuration */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration at the time of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_history_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the note is associated with */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., test_config, test_run) */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., informational, warning, error) */,
  "note_status" TEXT /* Status of the note (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "note_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the note (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES test_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)
